name: Homeco Daily Needs Reit
analysis: HDN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$1.2820, stop A$1.1806, target A$1.5863 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
